# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: apps/v1beta2
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: microservices
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: microservice
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true" # <-- Add this line here!
    spec:
      containers:
      - image: gcr.io/google-samples/microservices-demo/frontend:v0.2
